goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'kings lynn'.
The train should 'arrive by 14:30' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'east' and should serve 'gastropub' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '11:15' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to kings lynn
The train should arrive by 14:30 and should leave on thursday
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the east and should serve gastropub food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 11:15 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
